name: codex-bridge
description: Local multi-model gateway and desktop manager for Codex.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check scripts/generate-catalog.js && node --check scripts/desktop-smoke.mjs && node --check desktop/main.cjs && node --check desktop/preload.cjs && node --check desktop/renderer/app.js && node --test tests/*.test.js
